name: percom-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IEEE PerCom (International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications), the IEEE flagship for human-centric ubiquitous computing: routing among the ubicomp venues, the double-blind HotCRP submission on the IEEEtran 9+1 budget, the single-round rebuttal review with early rejection, activity-recognition and cross-subject evaluation of human-subjects sensing data, reproducible sensing datasets, and the IEEE Xplore camera-ready. Grounded in the PerCom 2026/2027 calls, percom.org, IEEE Xplore, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
